headline: Goldman Sachs Backs CLARITY Act Ahead 2024 Vote

article.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs ‘not perfect’ CLARITY Act as vote expected soon
article.summary: Goldman chief David Solomon will support the crypto market structure bill now in Congress, even as financial companies and banks are hesitant over provisions on stablecoins.

headline: Crypto Bill Stalls Amid $1B Regulatory Impasse

article.title: Here’s why the CLARITY Act’s ethics deal may be so hard to reach
article.summary: Both parties say they want US crypto market structure legislation, but a dispute over ethics rules and who enforces them is becoming the bill’s biggest obstacle.

headline: Stocks Plunge as Oil Surges Past $100 Barrier

article.title: Stocks Hit by AI and War Jitters as Oil Tops $100: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A surge in oil spurred by the escalating Iran war sent stocks and bonds lower, with Wall Street also rattled by renewed concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will pay off.

headline: US Yields Surge to 2026 Highs on Oil Spike

article.title: US Treasury Yields Rise to 2026 Highs With Oil Sparking Fed Bets
article.summary: US Treasury yields rose to their highest levels of the year as the threat of escalation in the Iran war sent oil prices higher and boosted bets that the Federal Reserve could raise interest rates as soon as next week.

headline: Brazilian Farmers Tokenize 10,000 Cows for Crypto Loans

article.title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
article.summary: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.

headline: $15M Pledged to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin by BlackRock

article.summary: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

headline: MoonPay Adds 60M Discover Cards to US Crypto Payments

article.summary: The addition makes Discover the third major U.S. card network supported by MoonPay, alongside Visa and Mastercard.
